question: How much has league average pace changed between 1998-99 and 2022-23?
notes: PLAN §12 row 15. Average of player-game pace from fact_player_game_advanced. Caveat: this is a player-game average (not a true team-game league aggregate), so a small bias toward starters/rotation is possible, but the season-over-season delta is reliable. The 2022-23 league is roughly +7 pace vs 1998-99 in this proxy.
